hero.body: Step into the digital spotlight. Perform live interactive stories with your community from anywhere in the world.
meta.home.title: potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.home.description: Step into the digital spotlight. potmagic is a live collaborative storytelling platform for families, friends, and creators to perform interactive stories from anywhere.
meta.home.ogDescription: Perform live interactive stories with your community from anywhere in the world. Directors, actors, and audiences connect in real-time.
meta.home.twitterDescription: Perform live interactive stories with your community from anywhere in the world.
meta.concept.title: Concept — potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.concept.description: Learn about the vision behind potmagic — a live story theater platform built for Directors, Actors, and Communities to create and share interactive stories in real-time.
meta.concept.ogDescription: A deliberate antidote to passive screen consumption. potmagic brings people together through live, collaborative storytelling.
